summary: Testing of configurable indirect cost percentage feature completed successfully. All backend API tests (6/6) and frontend UI tests passed. The feature allows Super Admin to configure the Direct/Indirect cost split (e.g., 70/30) via Settings > Company Profile > 'Indirect Cost %' field, and the dynamic percentage is correctly reflected in Budget Overview labels.

test_credentials.super_admin: Demo Access -> Super Admin (admin@constructionos.com) - Can configure indirect cost %
test_credentials.accountant: Demo Access -> Accountant (accountant@constructionos.com) - Read-only access to settings

context_for_next_testing_agent: The indirect_cost_percent feature is fully working. Current value is 30% (set during testing). Backend APIs: GET/POST /api/settings/company returns/updates indirect_cost_percent, GET /api/financial/project-budget-overview returns indirect_cost_percent and direct_cost_percent fields. Frontend: Settings page has data-testid='indirect-cost-percent-input' with dynamic 'Direct: X% | Indirect: Y%' label. Budget Overview in Finance > Indirect Costs shows dynamic 'X/Y Rule' and percentage column headers.

backend_tests.test_update_indirect_cost_percent_as_sup: PASS - POST /api/settings/company with indirect_cost_percent updates value
backend_tests.test_accountant_cannot_update_indirect_c: PASS - Accountant gets 403 when trying to update
backend_tests.test_project_budget_overview_returns_dyn: PASS - Returns indirect_cost_percent and direct_cost_percent that sum to 100
backend_tests.test_update_percent_reflects_in_budget_o: PASS - Changed percentage reflects in budget overview API
backend_tests.test_accountant_can_read_company_setting: PASS - Accountant can read but not modify

Super Admin Settings Page.details: Found Indirect Cost % input with value 30, dynamic label shows 'Direct: 70% | Indirect: 30%'

Budget Overview Dynamic Percentages.details: Shows '70/30 Rule', '30% Indirect Budget' label, column headers 'DIRECT (70%)' and 'INDIRECT (30%)'

Accountant Access Control.details: Accountant can login but cannot see/modify Indirect Cost % input in Settings (403 errors)

verified_features: POST /api/settings/company allows Super Admin to update indirect_cost_percent
GET /api/financial/project-budget-overview returns dynamic indirect_cost_percent and direct_cost_percent
Frontend Settings page shows 'Indirect Cost %' input with data-testid='indirect-cost-percent-input'
Dynamic 'Direct: X% | Indirect: Y%' label updates as user types
Budget Overview shows dynamic 'X/Y Rule' (e.g., '70/30 Rule') reflecting configured percentage
Accountant cannot modify company settings (403 Forbidden)
